summary: Monitoring & Queue features testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Monitoring tab verified with all sections displaying correctly. Three new features validated: 1) Monitoring service with middleware tracking API latencies, 2) Monitoring API endpoints returning comprehensive platform health metrics, 3) Redis Queue service with in-memory fallback (Redis unavailable in preview as expected).

authentication.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns access_token, role=admin, cognito groups

monitoring_endpoints.GET /api/admin/monitoring/metrics: PASS - Returns platform_health, emergency_activity, ai_safety, database, redis, guardian_sessions sections

queue_health.GET /api/admin/monitoring/queue-health: PASS - Returns 3 queues (incident, ai_signal, notification) with enqueued, processed, failed, depth stats. using_redis=false (in-memory fallback working)

system_health.GET /api/admin/system-health: PASS - Original endpoint still works, returns status=healthy

night_guardian.POST /api/night-guardian/start: PASS - Creates DB session with guardian_active=true
night_guardian.POST /api/night-guardian/update-location: PASS - Updates location, returns status fields

middleware_tracking.latency_recording: PASS - Middleware records API request latencies correctly, verified via metrics endpoint showing total_requests>0, p50/p95 values populated

database_pool.db_pool_stats: PASS - Pool stats present (pool_size=20, checked_out, available, overflow, status=healthy)

redis.redis_status: PASS - Status correctly shows 'disconnected' (expected in preview env without Redis)

frontend_tests.admin_panel_access: PASS - Admin panel loads at /admin route
frontend_tests.platform_health_section: PASS - Shows API Latency p50/p95, Total Requests, Error Rate, Top Endpoints table
frontend_tests.emergency_activity_section: PASS - Shows SOS(1h), Alerts(1h), Escalations, Fake Calls, Fake Notifs
frontend_tests.ai_safety_brain_section: PASS - Shows Risk Spikes, Heatmap, Anomalies, Active Guardian Sessions (3)
frontend_tests.database_pool_section: PASS - Shows Pool Size=20, Checked Out, Available, Overflow, status=healthy
frontend_tests.refresh_button: PASS - Refresh button clickable and updates metrics

terraform_review.staging_main_tf: VERIFIED - VPC (10.20.0.0/16), App SG, Aurora (higher capacity, deletion_protection=true), Cognito, Monitoring module
terraform_review.monitoring_module: VERIFIED - SNS topic, Aurora CPU/connections/memory alarms, SOS spike alarm, API latency alarm, API error rate alarm, CloudWatch log group
terraform_review.variables_tf: VERIFIED - All required variables defined (project, environment, aurora_cluster_id, sns_alert_email, thresholds)
terraform_review.outputs_tf: VERIFIED - SNS topic ARN and log group name outputs defined
terraform_review.file_structure: VERIFIED - All .tf files present: main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf, versions.tf, providers.tf, backend.tf

queue_service_hooks_verified.safety_brain_service.py: VERIFIED - Lines 199-216: record_risk_spike(), record_guardian_alert() + enqueue_ai_signal() hooks
queue_service_hooks_verified.notification_service.py: VERIFIED - Lines 57-64: enqueue_notification() hook in create_notification()

critical_code_review_comments: monitoring_service.py: Thread-safe with Lock, rolling window for latency tracking (1000 samples), correct percentile calculation
monitoring_middleware.py: Correctly filters /api/ prefixed paths, records method, path, status_code, duration_ms
queue_service.py: Redis Streams with consumer groups, proper in-memory fallback when Redis unavailable, stats tracking
MonitoringTab.jsx: All data-testid attributes present, auto-refresh with useEffect/setInterval, proper error handling
AdminPanel.jsx: Monitoring tab correctly integrated with MonitoringTab component
seed_data_creation: Night Guardian sessions created during testing (cleaned up by stop endpoint)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monitoring infrastructure fully operational. New endpoints: GET /api/admin/monitoring/metrics, GET /api/admin/monitoring/alerts, GET /api/admin/monitoring/queue-health. All require admin auth. Redis queue service falls back to in-memory in preview env (expected). Terraform files at /app/infra/staging/ - cannot apply in preview but syntax verified.
